home.subtitle: Follow class slides in real-time
home.teacherHint: Teacher? Install the Chrome extension to get started.
home.step1Desc: The teacher installs the Slide Sync Chrome extension in just a few clicks.
home.step2Desc: Start presenting normally. Students scan the QR code or enter the room code.
home.step3Desc: Students see each slide on their own device, updated instantly as the teacher advances.
home.featureSyncDesc: Slides update instantly on every student's device. Each click is captured, so animations and step-by-step builds just work.
home.featureAnnotationsDesc: Students can draw, highlight, and write notes directly on any slide using pen, text, or eraser tools.
home.featureExportDesc: Download all slides as a PDF, including your personal annotations, to review after class.
home.featureNoLoginDesc: Zero friction. No accounts, no sign-ups. Just enter the room code and start following along.
join.title: Join class
join.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code provided by your teacher
session.connectionError: Connection error. Room may not exist.
viewer.waiting: Waiting for the teacher to start the presentation...
viewer.clearConfirm: Clear all annotations on this slide?
download.title: Download PDF
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataCollection.title: Data Collection
privacy.dataCollection.body: The Slide Sync extension captures screenshots of Google Slides only during active presentation sessions. No personal information is collected. We do not use cookies, tracking pixels, or any form of analytics.
privacy.dataTransmission.title: Data Transmission
privacy.dataTransmission.body: Screenshots are transmitted via WebSocket for real-time delivery to students in the same session. All data is ephemeral and exists only in memory during the active session. Once the session ends, all data is discarded.
privacy.dataStorage.title: Data Storage
privacy.dataStorage.body: There is no server-side data storage. Local browser storage is used only to save the current session state (room code). No database is involved at any point.
privacy.thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdParty.body: PartyKit (powered by Cloudflare) is used as the WebSocket relay for real-time slide delivery. No analytics, advertising, or other third-party services are used.
privacy.permissions.title: Extension Permissions
privacy.permissions.body: The Chrome extension requests the following permissions:
privacy.permissions.activeTab: Capture the current presentation tab screenshot
privacy.permissions.tabs: Detect the active Google Slides presentation
privacy.permissions.host: Inject the capture UI and read slide content on Google Slides
privacy.openSource.title: Open Source
privacy.openSource.body: Slide Sync is fully open source. You can review all code on our GitHub repository at github.com/thiavila/lms.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.body: For questions or concerns about this privacy policy, please open an issue on our GitHub repository.
